changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: UPDATE packages SET default_pax = 2 WHERE code IN ('PKG_VIP_MASSAGE', 'PKG_VIP_FULL') AND organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'lasema');

changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO package_tiers (package_id, service_id, weekday_price, weekend_price) SELECT p.id, s.id, COALESCE(s.price, 0), COALESCE(s.price, 0) + CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.price, 0) > 0 THEN 100 ELSE 0 END FROM packages p JOIN services_catalogue s ON s.organization_id = p.organization_id WHERE p.is_active = true AND s.is_active = true AND s.code IN ( 'FOOT_REFLEX', 'SHIATSU', 'SWEDISH', 'DEEP_TISSUE', 'LOMI_LOMI', 'LYMPHATIC', 'COMBINATION', 'SALT_GLOW_SCRUB', 'MILK_BATH_SCRUB', 'DAEMIDI', 'THAI', 'AROMA_REFLEX', 'VENTOSA', 'TANDEM' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM package_tiers pt WHERE pt.package_id = p.id AND pt.service_id = s.id );
